ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genomic_data" (
  "reference_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the reference sequence */,
  "genome_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the genome being analyzed */,
  "iterations" INTEGER /* Number of iterations during analysis */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the sequence in the genome */,
  "coverage" REAL /* Coverage of the sequence (e.g., number of reads) */,
  "identity" REAL /* Identity percentage of the sequence alignment */,
  "sequence_logo" REAL /* Logarithmic value associated with sequence visualization */,
  "analysis_session_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the analysis_sessions table */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data_sources table */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the sample */,
  "library_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the library preparation */,
  "sequencing_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequencing was performed */,
  "quality_control_status" TEXT /* Status of the quality control checks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id", "genome_id", "position"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_data_analysis_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_session_id") REFERENCES analysis_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomes" (
  "genome_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the genome */,
  "genome_name" TEXT /* Name of the genome */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species from which the genome originates */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genome */,
  "assembly_version" TEXT /* Version number of the genome assembly */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the genome assembly was released */,
  "genomic_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the genome assembly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "password_expiration_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's password will expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user conducting the analysis */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "data_processed" INTEGER /* Amount of data processed during the session (in MB) */,
  "analysis_software_used" TEXT /* Software used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., sequencing technology) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the permission is granted */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource for which access is provided */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission will expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "reference_id" TEXT /* Reference ID associated with the variant */,
  "genome_id" TEXT /* Genome ID where the variant is located */,
  "variant_type" TEXT /* Type of variant (e.g., SNP, insertion, deletion) */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the variant in the sequence */,
  "alleles" TEXT /* Possible alleles for the variant */,
  "variant_impact" TEXT /* Predicted impact of the variant on gene function */,
  "genotype" TEXT /* Genotype information for the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_variants_genome_id FOREIGN KEY ("genome_id") REFERENCES genomes ("genome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_variants_reference_id FOREIGN KEY ("reference_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the region in the genome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_annotation" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sequence_variants table */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the annotation */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of annotation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_annotation_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES sequence_variants ("variant_id")
)
